hero.subtitle: No more manual input. Every transaction from your bank and e-wallet is recorded automatically from your email.

features.label: Key Features
features.title: Manage Money Without the Hassle
features.subtitle: From recording to analysis — everything runs on autopilot so you don't have to lift a finger.

items.title: Transactions Logged Automatically
items.description: Every bank and e-wallet notification in your Gmail becomes a financial record instantly. No typing, no spreadsheets.

items.title: Know Where Your Money Goes
items.description: See your spending breakdown through interactive charts. Instantly spot what's draining your wallet and what's not.

items.title: Categories That Get You
items.description: Transactions are auto-grouped into relevant categories. You can also customize them to match your own lifestyle.

items.title: Your Privacy, Protected
items.description: Your data is encrypted and only accessible by you. We never sell or share your information with anyone.

items.title: Create Account
items.description: Sign up with email or Google. Takes less than a minute.

items.title: Connect Gmail
items.description: Allow CatatUang to read transaction emails. That's it — nothing else.

items.title: Sit Back & Monitor
items.description: Your expenses are tracked and analyzed automatically. Just check the results.

cta.title: Start Taking Control of
cta.subtitle: CatatUang is in beta — try every feature for free while we keep improving.
